name: Argyle
description: A lattice of lozenges whose vertices quiver from seed to seed, dotted with pale pips — knitwear that never sits still.

code.style: --lozenge: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --rule: ( /* each vertex jitters independently, so the lozenges quiver organically */ @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--lozenge); clip-path: polygon(50% @rand(-6%, 10%), calc(100% - @rand(-6%, 10%)) 50%, 50% calc(100% - @rand(-6%, 10%)), @rand(-6%, 10%) 50%); } @random(0.22) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 13%; left: 43.5%; top: 43.5%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color4); transition: ease 600ms; } } transition: ease 600ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
